description.tr: Pre-export or pre-delivery storage options and insurance implications.
description.en: Pre-export or pre-delivery storage options and insurance implications.

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Aligning warehouse addresses with customs and delivery plans prevents missed handovers.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Aligning warehouse addresses with customs and delivery plans prevents missed handovers.
